Concepts webDatabricksDataGrailAtlanRunpodVectara

System

Architecture is the product

The system is the operating architecture that connects demand, data, CRM, workflow logic and reporting into one model.

Review the system See related page
01

Contexte

System definition

The system is not the tool stack. It is the logic that makes data, workflow and reporting behave as one operating model.

02

Modèle opératoire

Structure overview

Each layer should have a clear role and a clear boundary so the whole model stays readable.

01

Demand capture

02

Data and intelligence layer

03

CRM core

04

Workflow engine

05

Reporting layer

06

Review cadence

03

Couche système

Components

The architecture relies on a small number of connected components.

Data model

Create the base operating structure.

Automation logic

Turn the model into timely actions.

Commercial workflow

Make qualification and handoffs visible.

Reporting and review

Translate movement into decisions.

04

Modèle opératoire

Relationships

The value appears in the relationships between layers, not in any one platform by itself.

01

Demand capture feeds CRM and workflow entry

02

Data changes routing and priority

03

CRM events trigger automation

04

Reporting reflects the same model used in live work

05

Processus

Data flow

The flow should move from signal to action to review without hidden manual bridges.

01

Capture the account or lead input

02

Enrich and validate the context

03

Route by stage, priority and owner rules

04

Report movement and review the result

06

Preuve

Stability

A stable system stays understandable as volume, teams and channels change.

01

Fewer manual bridges

02

Clearer ownership

03

More predictable workflow behaviour

04

Safer change management

Map the system architecture

Consulter

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
